title: 圓滾貓的日常 4
description: 圓滾滾灰貓化身吃貨！16種貪吃日常貼圖

stickers.prompt: lying flat on ground, drooling, empty stomach growling, desperate hungry eyes, paws reaching forward weakly
tilting head to one side, question mark above head, paw on chin thinking, curious pondering expression
holding chopsticks in both paws, sparkling excited eyes, mouth open wide, eager anticipation, ready to eat
eyes squeezed shut in bliss, both cheeks stuffed full, happy tears, savoring delicious food, pure ecstasy expression
sitting up, both paws together begging, puppy eyes looking up, drooling, pleading cute expression, mouth slightly open, wanting more food
lying on back, round bloated belly, rubbing tummy with one paw, satisfied sleepy smile, food coma
looking at empty plate, big teary puppy eyes, trembling lower lip, both paws holding empty bowl, sad hungry
hugging food bowl tightly, fierce protective glare, hissing, arched back, guarding food aggressively
tiptoeing sneakily in the dark, holding snack in mouth, shifty guilty eyes looking sideways, midnight snack thief
looking down at own round belly, shocked wide eyes, both paws squeezing belly fat, horrified expression, sweat drops, oh no face
waving one paw dismissively, other paw holding snack, eating carelessly, smug unbothered expression, don't care attitude
jumping up excitedly, both paws raised in the air, sparkling eyes, huge open mouth smile, overjoyed celebration pose
sparkling starry eyes, both paws clasped together begging, drooling slightly, hopeful expectant expression, mooching pose
puffing chest out proudly, one paw slapping chest confidently, generous boss expression, cool sunglasses, treating someone
staring at cake with heart-shaped eyes, both paws on cheeks, blushing, lovestruck expression, dreamy face
carrying huge pile of food boxes stacked high, peeking from behind the stack, greedy satisfied grin, hoarding food
